title: armeria campestris var. kochii
intro: Armeria campestris var. kochii, also known as field thyme, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Plantaginaceae family. It is used in herbal medicine due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which can help to soothe respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. The plant's medicinal properties include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. Armeria campestris var. kochii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used to treat respiratory problems, skin conditions, and digestive issues.
